title: Amaranthium (Redstone Dirt)
description:
Adds a new dirt variant that can be toggled to turn on (or off) Redstone. *!Enjoy!*
(also, the Eighth installment in the "Amaranthium" series)
body:
A "very simple" Redstone mod,
It adds a new Dirt variant called, you guessed it,
'Redstone Dirt'.

Redstone Dirt can be toggled on/off to release a redstone signal of 15.
This is just to make an alternate lever that funtions as a whole block.
Redstone Dirt uses the rooted dirt texture, as I do not want it to look very suspicious with its own texture.

There is also a new trapdoor called the '"Grass" trapdoor', it is supposed to look like a grass block, but i couldn't find the propper texture.


Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish.

Please enjoy, as I would like others to be able to use this.
:)
